name: Grammar-Driven Research Produces Courses
description: Department grammars feed weighted question generation, which drives research cycles, which produce courses. The pipeline composes cleanly: grammar → question → research → course.
detection: Research cycle uses grammar productions AND produces a course with confidence >= 0.7
action: Continue and expand. Every department should have this pipeline running.
evidence: 2026-03-22: research-cycle skill designed around grammar-weighted question generation
2026-03-22: course-pipeline skill chains naturally from research output
2026-03-22: 7 department grammars created specifically to feed research cycles
promotion_candidate: If validated by 5+ actual research cycles, promote to policy
